sets.title: Computing Concepts
sets.description: Foundational ideas in computer science: hardware, software, and how computers work.

sets.title: Data Systems
sets.description: Databases, data models, SQL, and information systems.

sets.title: Java Review Mix
sets.description: 30 random questions drawn evenly from all Java sets. Each try gives a new mix.

sets.title: Hour of Java
sets.description: A short 11-question sampler covering every question type — great for testing and a first taste of Java.

sets.title: Java Basics
sets.description: Variables, primitive types, operators, and basic input/output.

sets.title: Control Flow
sets.description: Conditionals, loops, switch statements, and branching logic.

sets.title: Algorithms
sets.description: Searching, sorting, and fundamental problem-solving patterns.

sets.title: Functions & Methods
sets.description: Defining and calling methods, parameters, return types, and scope.

sets.title: Types, Null & Imports
sets.description: Type casting, null handling, wrapper classes, and package imports.

sets.title: Collections
sets.description: ArrayList, HashMap, LinkedList, and the Java Collections Framework.

sets.title: Object-Oriented Programming
sets.description: Classes, objects, encapsulation, constructors, and OOP principles.

sets.title: Inheritance & Polymorphism
sets.description: Extending classes, method overriding, abstract classes, and interfaces.

sets.title: Exceptions
sets.description: Error handling, try/catch/finally, checked vs. unchecked exceptions.

sets.title: Streams & Lambdas
sets.description: Functional-style data processing with the Java Streams API.

sets.title: GUI, Git & Dev Workflow
sets.description: Swing basics, Git and GitHub, MVC, agential AI, testing, and VS Code workflows for simple Java projects.

sets.title: Network+ Review Mix
sets.description: 30 random questions drawn evenly from all Network+ sets. Each try gives a new mix.

sets.title: Network+ Fundamentals
sets.description: OSI model, network appliances, cloud concepts, and common ports, protocols, and traffic types.

sets.title: Media, Topology & IPv4 Addressing
sets.description: Transmission media and transceivers, network topologies and architectures, IPv4 addressing, and modern environments (SDN, SASE, IaC, IPv6).

sets.title: Routing & Switching
sets.description: Static and dynamic routing (BGP, OSPF, EIGRP), route selection, NAT/PAT, FHRP, VLANs, trunking, spanning tree, link aggregation, and MTU.

sets.title: Wireless & Physical Installations
sets.description: Wi-Fi channels and bands, SSIDs/BSSIDs, WPA2/WPA3, antennas, autonomous vs. lightweight APs, plus MDF/IDF, racks, UPS/PDU, and environmental controls.

sets.title: Operations & Monitoring
sets.description: Documentation, IPAM, SLAs, life-cycle management, change/configuration management, and monitoring with SNMP, flow data, syslog/SIEM, packet capture, and port mirroring.

sets.title: DR, Network Services & Access
sets.description: DR metrics and sites, HA and testing; DHCP, SLAAC, DNS records and DNSSEC/DoH/DoT, NTP/PTP; VPNs, jump boxes, and in-band vs. out-of-band management.

sets.title: Network Security Concepts
sets.description: Encryption, PKI, IAM and authentication protocols (RADIUS/TACACS+/SAML/LDAP), least privilege/RBAC, physical security, honeypots, CIA triad, PCI/GDPR, and segmentation for IoT, OT, guest, and BYOD.

sets.title: Attacks & Defense
sets.description: DoS/DDoS, VLAN hopping, MAC flooding, ARP/DNS poisoning, rogue DHCP/AP, evil twin, on-path, social engineering and malware; plus device hardening, NAC (port security, 802.1X), ACLs, URL filtering, and zones.

sets.title: Troubleshooting Methodology & Cabling
sets.description: Seven-step methodology, OSI top-down/bottom-up; cable categories, STP vs. UTP, signal degradation, CRC/runts/giants, port states, PoE budgets, and transceiver mismatches.

sets.title: Services, Performance & Wireless Troubleshooting
sets.description: Switching/STP, VLAN/ACL/route-selection issues, DHCP exhaustion, gateway/IP/mask problems, congestion/latency/jitter/packet loss, and Wi-Fi interference, coverage, roaming, and disassociation.

sets.title: Tools & Device Commands
sets.description: ping, traceroute, nslookup/dig, tcpdump, netstat, ipconfig/arp, Nmap, LLDP/CDP, speed testers; toner, cable testers, taps, VFL, Wi-Fi analyzers; and show mac/route/interface/config/arp/vlan/power.

sets.title: Security Governance, Compliance & Ethics
sets.description: Policies vs. standards vs. procedures vs. guidelines; RACI and management commitment; security awareness and OPSEC; COBIT vs. ITIL; data governance across staging and production; industry-specific regimes (PCI DSS, HIPAA, GLBA, SOX, FedRAMP, NERC CIP); ISO 27000, GDPR, CCPA, DMA, data sovereignty; reporting and security frameworks (SOC 2, NIST CSF, CIS Benchmarks/Controls, CSA CCM); GRC tooling.

sets.title: Risk Management & Threat Modeling
sets.description: Quantitative and qualitative risk (SLE/ARO/ALE), risk appetite, GRC monitoring; threat actors and supply-chain risk (Target HVAC); MITRE ATT&CK, Kill Chain, STRIDE, Diamond, CAPEC, attack trees, abuse cases, antipatterns; attack surface, EASM, shadow IT discovery; legal holds, due diligence/care, export controls; M&A and divestitures, greenfield vs. brownfield; BCDR, RTO/RPO, backups, integrity, IR testing.

sets.title: AI Threats & Governance
sets.description: Legal, ethical, and privacy issues in AI adoption; explainability; deepfakes (2019 UK CEO voice fraud); OWASP LLM Top 10 — direct and indirect prompt injection, insecure output handling, training-data poisoning, model DoS, model theft and inversion, supply-chain risks; overreliance, sensitive-information disclosure, excessive agency and insecure plug-ins; enterprise guardrails, DLP, RAG security, agentic AI permissions.

sets.title: Security Architecture & Zero Trust
sets.description: Component placement (WAF, reverse proxy, API gateway, NAC, CDN); load balancing (active-active vs. active-passive), session persistence, geographic placement; Zero Trust principles, attestation, BeyondCorp; SASE and SD-WAN; microsegmentation, data perimeters, SDN; sensor placement and defense-in-depth; data classification, labeling, DLP at rest and in transit; control-effectiveness metrics.

sets.title: Security Operations & Incident Response
sets.description: SOC detection engineering, SIEM and SOAR tuning, triage and severity modeling, containment and eradication strategy, evidence preservation and chain of custody, legal hold and notification governance, threat hunting, shift handoff quality, tabletop maturity, and business-aligned resilience metrics.

sets.title: IAM, Cryptography & Secure Engineering
sets.description: Federation and adaptive access, privileged access management and JIT elevation, secrets lifecycle, PKI architecture and revocation, mTLS and nonrepudiation, secure SDLC and software supply-chain controls, API authorization design, crypto agility, key rotation operations, SBOM value, and accountable break-glass access.
